description: World's #1 used semiconductor equipment dealer and platform. Buys, sells, consigns, and brokers 1,500+ used semiconductor equipment annually for front-end, back-end, and display processes. Since 2000, has transacted 50,000+ equipment units with 4,000+ semiconductor companies globally. Services: consignment sales, global sourcing, logistics, equipment testing, trade-in, reconfiguration, and A/S. Located in Yongin, Gyeonggi Province (21,000-pyeong semiconductor equipment cluster with 660-pyeong cleanroom). Subsidiaries in USA, China, Japan, Taiwan, Singapore. KOSDAQ listed 2017.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - handles used Accretech probers, dicers, CMP equipment
majorClients: DB HiTek (CMP-0075) - used equipment for legacy node fabs
Various global fabs, OSAT companies, and emerging semiconductor manufacturers
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap: 784B KRW. KOSDAQ listed 2017. FY2024 revenue grew 65.4% YoY. However FY2025 struggling: 9-month revenue -24.2% YoY, turned to operating loss. FY2025 EPS: -445 KRW (loss). Expanding from equipment trading to parts distribution business. World's largest semiconductor equipment cluster facility. SurplusGLOBAL is a key secondary market channel for Accretech equipment - many Korean fabs and OSAT companies acquire used Accretech probers and dicers through SurplusGLOBAL.

_metadata.dataSource: FnGuide, SurplusGLOBAL IR, SEMI, ZDNet Korea, Newswire
